sentence: Hoje não faz sol nem calor.
ipa: ˈɔʒɨ ˈnɐ̃w̃ ˈfaʃ ˈsɔɫ ˈnẽ kɐˈlɔʁ
gloss_en: Today it is neither sunny nor hot.
notes: Macau Portuguese follows the standard European baseline per macanese_wikipedia2024: coda chiado [ʃ] in 'faz', velarised coda [ɫ] in 'sol', [ɨ]-reduction in 'hoje' and uvular strong-R in 'calor'.

sentence: O bilhete custa doze euros e meio.
ipa: ˈo biˈʎɛtɨ ˈkuʃtɐ ˈdɔzɨ ˈewʁuz ˈe ˈmeju
gloss_en: The ticket costs twelve euros fifty.
notes: Palatal [ʎ] in 'bilhete', coda [ʃ] in 'custa' and 'euros e' liaison, all inherited from the EP norm per macanese_wikipedia2024.

sentence: Tenho consulta na quinta-feira às nove horas.
ipa: ˈtɛɲu kõˈsuɫtɐ ˈnɐ ˈkĩtɐ ˈfejʁɐ ˈaʒ ˈnɔvɨ ˈɔʁɐʃ
gloss_en: I have an appointment on Thursday at nine.
notes: Coda [ʒ]/[ʃ] in 'às'/'horas' and palatal [ɲ] in 'tenho' per the EP-following norm in macanese_wikipedia2024.

sentence: A minha família mora numa casa antiga.
ipa: ˈɐ ˈmiɲɐ fɐˈmiliɐ ˈmɔʁɐ ˈnumɐ ˈkazɐ ɐ̃ˈtiɡɐ
gloss_en: My family lives in an old house.
notes: Palatal [ɲ] in 'minha'; intervocalic 'mora' surfaces with uvular [ʁ] where the EP baseline has a tap [ɾ] — the engine over-applies the strong-R across all 'r' graphemes. EP-following norm per macanese_wikipedia2024.

sentence: Vira à direita e segue sempre em frente.
ipa: ˈviʁɐ ˈa diˈʁejtɐ ˈe ˈsɛɡɨ ˈsẽpʁɨ ˈẽ ˈfʁẽtɨ
gloss_en: Turn right and keep going straight ahead.
notes: Retained 'ei' diphthong in 'direita' and full [ɨ]-reduction; every 'r' realised uvular [ʁ] per the engine's strong-R generalisation over the EP-following norm in macanese_wikipedia2024.

sentence: Este bacalhau está muito salgado.
ipa: ˈeʃtɨ bɐkɐˈʎaw eˈʃta ˈmujtu sɐˈɫɡadu
gloss_en: This cod is very salty.
notes: Palatal [ʎ] in 'bacalhau', coda [ʃ] in 'este' and velarised coda [ɫ] in 'salgado' per macanese_wikipedia2024.

sentence: Onde fica a estação de comboios?
ipa: ˈõdɨ ˈfikɐ ˈɐ eʃtɐˈsɐ̃w̃ ˈdɨ kõˈbojuʃ
gloss_en: Where is the train station?
notes: Nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'estação' and coda [ʃ] per the EP baseline in macanese_wikipedia2024.

sentence: Quantos quilos de pão queres?
ipa: ˈkɐ̃tuʃ ˈkiluʒ ˈdɨ ˈpɐ̃w̃ ˈkɛʁɨʃ
gloss_en: How many kilos of bread do you want?
notes: Nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'pão' and coda [ʃ]/[ʒ] in 'quantos'/'quilos' per macanese_wikipedia2024.

sentence: Se chovesse, ficávamos em casa.
ipa: ˈsɨ ʃuˈvɛs̺ɨ fiˈkavɐmuz ˈẽ ˈkazɐ
gloss_en: If it rained, we would stay home.
notes: Open mid [ɛ] in 'chovesse', [ɨ]-reduction and coda [ʃ] per the EP-following norm in macanese_wikipedia2024.

sentence: Ontem comprei peixe fresco no mercado.
ipa: ˈõtɨ̃ kõˈpʁej ˈpejʃɨ ˈfʁɛʃku ˈnu mɨˈʁkadu
gloss_en: Yesterday I bought fresh fish at the market.
notes: Retained 'ei' diphthong in 'comprei'/'peixe' and coda [ʃ] per macanese_wikipedia2024.

sentence: Para o ano vou viajar até ao Porto.
ipa: ˈpaʁɐ ˈo ˈɐnu ˈvo viɐˈʒaʁ ɐˈtɛ ˈɐu ˈpɔʁtu
gloss_en: Next year I will travel to Porto.
notes: 'até ao' vowel liaison and the [ɐu] sequence; EP-following norm per macanese_wikipedia2024.

sentence: Liga-me mais tarde, por favor.
ipa: ˈliɡɐ ˈmɨ ˈmajʃ ˈtaʁdɨ ˈpɔʁ fɐˈvɔʁ
gloss_en: Call me later, please.
notes: Coda [ʃ] in 'mais' and uvular strong-R in 'tarde'/'favor' per macanese_wikipedia2024.

sentence: Olá, tudo bem contigo?
ipa: oˈla ˈtudu ˈbẽ kõˈtiɡu
gloss_en: Hi, are you doing well?
notes: Nasal [ẽ] in 'bem' and close-mid vowels in 'contigo' per macanese_wikipedia2024.

sentence: Quem não arrisca, não petisca.
ipa: ˈkẽ ˈnɐ̃w̃ ɐˈʁiʃkɐ ˈnɐ̃w̃ pɨˈtiʃkɐ
gloss_en: Nothing ventured, nothing gained.
notes: Uvular strong-R [ʁ] from 'rr' in 'arrisca' and coda [ʃ], inherited from EP per macanese_wikipedia2024.

sentence: O carro corre depressa na estrada molhada.
ipa: ˈo ˈkaʁu ˈkɔʁɨ dɨˈpʁɛs̺ɐ ˈnɐ eˈʃtʁadɐ muˈʎadɐ
gloss_en: The car speeds down the wet road.
notes: Uvular [ʁ] in 'carro'/'corre' and coda [ʃ] in 'estrada'; EP-following norm per macanese_wikipedia2024.

sentence: O melhor vinho branco vem do Douro.
ipa: ˈo mɨˈʎɔʁ ˈviɲu ˈbʁɐ̃ku ˈvẽ ˈdu ˈdoʁu
gloss_en: The best white wine comes from the Douro.
notes: Palatal [ʎ] in 'melhor', palatal [ɲ] in 'vinho' and the 'ou' diphthong in 'Douro' per macanese_wikipedia2024.

sentence: A velha ponte de pedra ainda aguenta.
ipa: ˈɐ ˈvɛʎɐ ˈpõtɨ ˈdɨ ˈpɛdʁɐ ˈaj̃dɐ ɐˈɡẽtɐ
gloss_en: The old stone bridge still holds.
notes: Palatal [ʎ] in 'velha', nasal [õ] in 'ponte' and open mid [ɛ] in 'pedra' per macanese_wikipedia2024.

sentence: Nunca vi um céu tão azul.
ipa: ˈnũkɐ ˈvi ˈũ kɛˈu ˈtɐ̃w̃ ɐˈzuɫ
gloss_en: I never saw such a blue sky.
notes: Open mid [ɛ] in 'céu', nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'tão' and velarised coda [ɫ] in 'azul' per macanese_wikipedia2024.

sentence: O sol pôs-se atrás da montanha.
ipa: ˈo ˈsɔɫ ˈpoʃ ˈsɨ ɐˈtʁaʒ ˈdɐ mõˈtaɲɐ
gloss_en: The sun set behind the mountain.
notes: Velarised coda [ɫ] in 'sol', palatal [ɲ] in 'montanha' and coda [ʃ]/[ʒ] per macanese_wikipedia2024.

sentence: Ele trouxe rosas roxas do jardim.
ipa: ˈelɨ ˈtʁoʃɨ ˈʁɔzɐʒ ˈʁɔʃɐʒ ˈdu ʒɐˈʁdĩ
gloss_en: He brought red roses from the garden.
notes: Uvular strong-R [ʁ] in 'rosas'/'roxas' and the coda sibilants of 'rosas'/'roxas', all EP-following per macanese_wikipedia2024.
